summary.title: Enable Time Sensitive Notifications in TestFlight
changes: The TestFlight setup guide now tells you to enable Time Sensitive Notifications for the Trio identifier.
You are instructed that this capability can be enabled while adding the Trio App Group.
A new step-by-step section explains how to enable Time Sensitive Notifications for the Trio identifier.
The guide clarifies that Time Sensitive Notifications is required only for the Trio identifier and not the others.
